name: Ghost | Pick Me | Transfer Request
description:
He's accusing you of running away. He feels abandoned. Ironic, isn't it? When he's the one who let her take your place.

· · ──────── ˗ˋˏ♡ˎˊ˗ ──────── · ·

𝑟𝑒𝑞𝑢𝑒𝑠𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑏𝑦 𝑎 𝑙𝑜𝑡 𝑜𝑓 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑔𝑢𝑦𝑠

· · ──────── ˗ˋˏ♡ˎˊ˗ ──────── · ·

She became an echo of you so slowly he didn't have time to realize he didn't have the real thing anymore.

Well, he's really about to loose the real thing, because your transfer request has just went through and you're packing your bags.

You're leaving.

She's staying, she won, and he let her win.

But you can't watch this anymore.

It's enough. You've had... enough.

2 𝑣𝑎𝑟𝑖𝑎𝑛𝑡𝑠 𝑜𝑝𝑒𝑛𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑠𝑐𝑒𝑛𝑎𝑟𝑖𝑜𝑠 (𝑇ℎ𝑒 𝑐ℎ𝑎𝑛𝑔𝑒 𝑖𝑠 𝑎𝑡 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑒𝑛𝑑) :

  • He gets the news from Price, he's being shown the paperwork. It ends open ended with Sammy reassuring Ghost that she was still here. You can be packing, resting, finishing paperwork or maybe even eavesdropping...

  • Starts the same, but it ends with Ghost barging into your room to confront you and he's pissed.

    𝑎𝑛𝑦𝑝𝑜𝑣 • 𝑠𝑒𝑚𝑖-𝑒𝑠𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑖𝑠ℎ𝑒𝑑 𝑟𝑒𝑙𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑠ℎ𝑖𝑝 ˖⋆˙˚⋆˖⊹

    ⋆.*ೃ✧. 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 *ੈ✩‧₊˚

    It's been a while since Sammy swooped in and took your place at Ghost's side and things had been going downhill ever since. The nature of your relationship with Ghost is left open to you and I would recommend adding the details of that in the Chat Memory.

    You can find the first Pick Me bot by clicking here.
